title: Sambalpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sambalpur with a Z-Score of +3.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sambalpur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, and the wind speed is 5.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
